name: AESA Multi-Function Radar
missionProfile: Fictional air-surveillance and tracking electronics demonstrator
description: Active electronically scanned array concept with transmit/receive tile health, exciter stability, cooling reserve and synthetic RF-quality overlays.

name: Coastal Surveillance Radar
missionProfile: Fictional maritime surface-search and coastal-watch sensor
description: Rotating surveillance radar concept with pedestal vibration, receiver-noise margin, radome environmental load and uptime indicators.

name: Weapon Locating Radar
description: High-duty-cycle phased-array concept showing thermal soak, structural fatigue, RF aperture quality and reduced-envelope recommendations.

name: Electronic Warfare Suite
missionProfile: Fictional ESM/ECM receiver, processor and countermeasure chain
description: Electronic-support and countermeasure concept with wideband receiver quality, processor load, power-amplifier stress and audit-ready recommendations.

name: IFF Interrogator / Transponder
missionProfile: Fictional identification electronics with crypto-safe synthetic status only
description: Identification-friend-or-foe electronics concept using non-sensitive channel-health, timing, power and self-test indicators.

name: Software Defined Radio Node
missionProfile: Fictional multi-band communication node for networked operations
description: Modular radio concept with waveform processor load, PA health, timing stability and network-readiness telemetry.

name: Electro-Optical Fire Control System
missionProfile: Fictional stabilized day/night sensor and tracker twin
description: EO/IR gimbal concept with lens clarity, stabilization error, detector temperature and synthetic atmospheric-load overlays.
